STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SKYBOUND_ART_POWER: Internal. Whenever a Skybound Art card is drawn, its effect fires.

STS2_CHAR_PORTALCRAFT-SLAUS_REVOLVING_WH: Crest: Slaus, Revolving Wheel of Fortune
